name: Yelawolf: A Slumerican Life
overview: Slumerican docu-series tries to crack the enigma that is Yelawolf. The 10-part documentary series follows the Gadsden, Alabama representative as he travels across the country to meet, experience, and appreciate the people and places that align with the Slumerican lifestyle.

trailers.title: Yelawolf: A Slumerican Life | Available now only on Crackle (Official Trailer)
